{{Quote|Lemme shoot him in the back, no one has to know.|[[Atton Rand]], when Vhek goes to claim the ''Ebon Hawk''|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Ratrin Vhek''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] known to frequent the moon [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Biography==

When [[Meetra Surik]] arrived on Nar Shaddaa in [[3951 BBY]], Vhek claimed to be a former owner of the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'', stating that it had been stolen from him a short time before the end of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. He backed up his claim by reciting some of the vessel's rather secret technical details, including the location of some hidden compartments.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

He was killed by [[Cahhmakt]] when trying to board the ''Ebon Hawk'' during the [[Red Eclipse]] assault, so the ship remained in Surik's possession.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

==Behind the scenes==
In material cut from the game, the Red Eclipse slavers would keep Vhek alive, after he claimed to be the owner of the ship. They held him in the security room with Cahhmakt. Once Meetra slew all of the slavers, Ratrin would say that since the ship attracts so much attention now, he doesn't want it back, and leaves the ship.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

Alternatively, the player can give Vhek to the Red Eclipse as a slave. He protests, to which Cahhmakt coldly replies "Slaves do not talk."<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

==Appearances==
